sprint: Add Something -- Combine Sticker/Decoration/Shape, Remove Photo
task: A direct follow-up to the Personalize <-> Refine sprint's own '+ Add Something' menu: removed the Photo row (duplicated the existing per-Place Add Artwork flow already reachable on canvas) and combined the separate Stickers/Decorations/Shape rows into one entry point, since Sticker Studio's own category tab strip already gives full reach across every category the instant it opens -- pre-filtering to one shelf added no real capability. Deleted the now-orphaned _addPhoto/_firstOpenPlaceSelection helpers outright. Verified via a new Playwright test (4 rows remain, no Photo/separate rows, the combined row opens Sticker Studio with all 18 category tabs visible) plus full regression across the existing Creator/Builder suite and both goldenBuild.js suites, zero console errors. Confined to js/contextPanel.js.
